description: Founder-VC introductory meeting transcript with multiple drivers, milestones, and commitments.

contact_memory.name: Sarah Jenkins
contact_memory.who_are_they: Founder and CEO of NextGen AI.
contact_memory.why_talking: Looking to raise a Seed round.

new_interaction.content:
Founder: Thanks for the time, Sarah. We loved your background. Did you get the pitch deck I emailed yesterday?
Sarah Jenkins: Yes, I received the pitch deck. I went through it, and the architecture diagram was very clean. However, my main concern is customer acquisition cost (CAC). How do you plan to scale it down?
Founder: We are shifting to a product-led growth model. I'll send you our detailed financial model and CAC projections by Friday.
Sarah Jenkins: Excellent, send that over. Let's schedule a follow-up demo for next week. I will review the financial model as soon as I get it.

new_identity_facts: Sarah Jenkins reviewed the pitch deck and liked the architecture diagram.

milestones.summary: Sarah Jenkins confirmed receipt of the Seed pitch deck
milestones.evidence_quote: Yes, I received the pitch deck.

commitments.description: Send detailed financial model and CAC projections by Friday
commitments.evidence_quote: I'll send you our detailed financial model and CAC projections by Friday.

commitments.description: Review the financial model upon receipt
commitments.evidence_quote: I will review the financial model as soon as I get it.

reconciliations.reason: Pitch deck confirmed received and reviewed by the contact.
reconciliations.evidence_quote: Yes, I received the pitch deck.

description: Email thread resolving a technical doc request and scheduling a technical deep-dive.

contact_memory.name: Amit Patel
contact_memory.why_talking: Interested in our database proxy solution.

open_commitments.description: Send technical architecture document for proxy latency overhead

new_interaction.content:
From: founder@memorycrm.com
To: amit@cloudshield.com
Subject: Latency breakdown doc

Amit, following up on our call, here is the latency breakdown document attached.

From: amit@cloudshield.com
To: founder@memorycrm.com

Thanks for sending the document. The latency overhead seems acceptable (under 2ms). Let's do a technical deep dive. I'll ask my lead architect, Divya, to join us. I will set up a Zoom invite for next Tuesday.

new_identity_facts: Amit Patel reviewed the latency document and found the overhead (< 2ms) acceptable.
Divya is the lead architect at CloudShield.

milestones.summary: Technical document received and latency concerns resolved
milestones.evidence_quote: Thanks for sending the document. The latency overhead seems acceptable (under 2ms).

commitments.description: Set up a Zoom invite for a technical deep dive next Tuesday
commitments.evidence_quote: I will set up a Zoom invite for next Tuesday.

new_interaction.content:
[10:15 AM] Founder: Hey Marcus, just wanted to check if you had any thoughts on our roadmap?
[10:20 AM] Marcus: Looks solid, but I have doubts about the GTM speed. Are you hiring a Head of Sales soon?
[10:22 AM] Founder: Yes, looking to hire in Q3. I'll share the job description with you once it's ready.
[10:25 AM] Marcus: Great, send it over and I can share it with a few candidates.

new_identity_facts: Marcus Aurelius has doubts about GTM speed.
Company planning to hire a Head of Sales in Q3.

description: Sales call transcript containing a security objection and demo milestone.

new_interaction.content:
Elena: The demo was great. I'm impressed by the speed. But do you store raw tokens? We require SAML metadata to be encrypted at rest.
Founder: We encrypt everything at rest using AES-256. I'll have our security team email you our SOC2 Type II report.
Elena: Perfect. I will introduce you to our VP of Infrastructure, Kevin, to discuss setup.

new_identity_facts: Elena Rostova was impressed by the demo speed.
SecureAuth requires SAML metadata to be encrypted at rest.
Kevin is the VP of Infrastructure at SecureAuth.
new_objections: SAML metadata raw token storage concerns

milestones.summary: Elena Rostova completed the product demonstration
